message:
deps: upgrade sha2, similar, fastmcp-rust, self_update, assert_cmd

- sha2 0.10.9 -> 0.11.0 (MSRV 1.85; Array<u8,U32> no longer impls LowerHex
  so introduces util::hex_encode helper and migrates all 18 format!("{:x}",
  digest.finalize()) call sites across src/ and tests/)
- similar 2.7.0 -> 3.1.0 (MSRV 1.85; our sole use site TextDiff::from_lines
  unchanged; insta dev-dep still pulls 2.7.0 transitively)
- fastmcp-rust 0.2.1 -> 0.3.0 (pulls asupersync 0.3.1 transitively; gated
  behind the mcp feature; our Server::new / McpError / McpResult surface
  unchanged)
- self_update 0.42 -> 0.44 (reqwest 0.12 -> 0.13 refactor; backend is now
  a separate feature, so explicitly opt into "reqwest" alongside "rustls")
- assert_cmd 2.1 -> 2.2.1 (dev-dep, patch)

Verified clean against: cargo check --all-targets (default + mcp +
all-features); cargo test util::hash (8 pass); cargo test proptest_hash
(11 pass); cargo test jsonl_import_export (162 pass); cargo test
conformance (335 pass, 0 regressed).

Content hashes remain byte-identical across the upgrade (SHA-256 is
standardized; digest 0.11 only changed the Rust-level output *type*,
not the hash value).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ schemars = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive", "chrono04"] }
 chrono = { version = "0.4.43", features = ["serde"] }
 
 # Hashing
-sha2 = "0.10.9"
+sha2 = "0.11.0"
 
 # Error handling
 anyhow = "1.0.102"
@@ -99,24 +99,24 @@ dunce = "1.0.5"
 once_cell = "1.21"
 regex = "1.12"
 shell-words = "1.1.1"
-similar = "2.7.0"
+similar = "3.1.0"
 tempfile = "3.25"
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 
 # Versioning
 semver = "1.0.27"
 
 # MCP server (optional; gated behind the `mcp` feature)
-fastmcp-rust = { version = "0.2.1", optional = true }
+fastmcp-rust = { version = "0.3.0", optional = true }
 
 # Self-update (optional; gated behind the `self_update` feature)
-self_update = { version = "0.42", features = ["rustls", "archive-tar", "compression-flate2"], default-features = false, optional = true }
+self_update = { version = "0.44", features = ["reqwest", "rustls", "archive-tar", "compression-flate2"], default-features = false, optional = true }
 
 [build-dependencies]
 vergen-gix = { version = "9.1", features = ["build", "cargo", "rustc"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-assert_cmd = "2.1"
+assert_cmd = "2.2.1"
 predicates = "3.1.4"
 criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
 walkdir = "2.5"
